title: Public functions in rpl/routing.py missing return type annotations
description:
Four public functions in `src/lichen/rpl/routing.py` are missing return type annotations:

- Line 87: `DownwardRoutingTable.add_route()` - returns `None`
- Line 101: `DownwardRoutingTable.build_source_route()` - returns `list[IPv6Address] | None`
- Line 119: `insert_source_route()` - returns `tuple[IPv6Packet, IPv6Address]`
- Line 155: `advance_source_route()` - returns `tuple[IPv6Packet, IPv6Address | None]`
